enriched_points.expanded_content: Longitudinal studies track entrepreneurial ecosystem changes over time, revealing industry dynamics and firm location evolution, as shown in recent research. (Source 1, 3, 5)
Investigating how emerging technologies reshape entrepreneurial ecosystems is crucial. Research highlights their influence on entrepreneurial activities and ecosystem adaptability. (Source 3, 4)

Comparative studies enhance understanding of diverse entrepreneurial ecosystems, showcasing regional differences and best practices. This approach enriches global entrepreneurship insights. (Source 2, 5)
Research should prioritize sustainability within entrepreneurial ecosystems, examining how sustainable practices influence growth and resilience in a changing economic landscape.
